feedback.text: I kindly plead that you add protection from publishers, who believe it is okay to destroy it terminate video games that people have already purchased. It is not fair to consumers. The Crew, Concord - to mention a few games that have been shut down, because it didn't sell well. Even though it is not the consumers fault they didn't produce games people didn't want, and when a select few people that actually liked it bought it, it is taken away from them, because the companies didn't see billions in return. Thank you for your time and patience in reading this.
